title: Sunday Beauty Queen
overview: Beneath Hong Kong's glittering facade, Filipina domestic helpers work in relative anonymity and for near-slave wages. In a beauty pageant like no other, five helpers give themselves makeovers for a day and gleefully reclaim their dignity.

trailers.title: SUNDAY BEAUTY QUEEN BY BABYRUTH VILLARAMA
